source_pr.title: planner: add more test cases for Plan Clone
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #54057

Problem Summary: planner: add more test cases for Plan Clone

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: testCachedPlanClone(t, tk1, tk2, `prepare st from 'select * from t where a<? order by a'`, (pkg/planner/core/plan_cache_rebuild_test.go)
failure_signature: testCachedPlanClone(t, tk1, tk2, `prepare st from 'select * from t where a<? order by a'`, (pkg/planner/core/plan_cache_rebuild_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: testCachedPlanClone(t, tk1, tk2, `prepare st from 'select * from t where a<? order by a'`, (pkg/planner/core/plan_cache_rebuild_test.go)

files: pkg/expression/builtin.go, pkg/expression/column.go, pkg/expression/constant.go, pkg/expression/scalar_function.go, pkg/expression/util_test.go, pkg/planner/core/operator/baseimpl/plan.go, pkg/planner/core/physical_plans.go, pkg/planner/core/plan_cache_rebuild_test.go, pkg/planner/core/plan_cache_utils.go, pkg/planner/core/plan_clone_generated.go, pkg/planner/core/plan_clone_generator.go, pkg/planner/util/misc.go, pkg/util/collate/bin.go, pkg/util/collate/collate.go, pkg/util/collate/gbk_bin.go, pkg/util/collate/gbk_chinese_ci.go, pkg/util/collate/general_ci.go, pkg/util/collate/pinyin_tidb_as_cs.go, pkg/util/collate/ucaimpl/unicode_ci.go.tpl, pkg/util/collate/unicode_0400_ci_generated.go, pkg/util/collate/unicode_0400_ci_impl.go, pkg/util/collate/unicode_0900_ai_ci_generated.go, pkg/util/collate/unicode_0900_ai_ci_impl.go
